name: @iris/schedule
description: Iris schedules — a recurring job as a durable, replayable agent: each cycle reads the logical clock, runs a job effect, and parks on a durable timer until the next run. A host-side multi-session pump (tick) discovers due sessions via the scheduler's dueWakeups and resumes them, confirming a wakeup only after a committed turn (at-least-once). Cadence lives in the journal, so the whole schedule replays identically. Deps @iris/core + @iris/host only.
